_comment: Canonical AM/PM Overlap task assignments by slot position. The TASK is fixed per slot; the PERSON in the slot rotates day-to-day. Updated when supervisor reorganizes overlap responsibilities. Read by both fill_engine.py (for audit records) and render_deployment_book.py (for the printed deployment book).

_per_day_overrides._comment: Optional per-date overrides — keyed by ISO date. When supervisor doubles up a person on combined slots (e.g., 5 names but 6 task slots), encode the doubling here. The renderer applies these on top of the canonical mapping.

AM.AMOL4: Sandhill / Lobby Bar; 131 / Group Room / CBK Office
